Postion :
Human Resource Officer
Location :
Ethiopian Skylight Hotel
Description :
CALL FOR COMPETENCY BASED INTERVIEW
Among those candidates who submitted their application for the position of
Human Resource Officer
, the following listed applicants are requested to come for
Competency Based Interview (CBI)
on
Saturday, March 21, 2026, at
02:30 Local Time (Morning)
at
Ethiopian Skylight Hotel.
Notes:
REPORTING TIME
: The candidates are requested to report on
Saturday, March 21, 2026,
at the aforesaid venue (
Ethiopian Skylight Hotel
) at
@ 02:30 Local Time (Morning)
sharp.
Ethiopian Skylight Hotel has admitted the candidates for the Interview Examination on the basis of information furnished during the application period. The eligibility of the candidates with regards to upper age, qualification and experience etc. will be re-verified at the time of second round documents verification. Appearing for interview will not vest any right on the candidates for claiming her/his eligibility in fulfilling the criteria.
ALL CANDIDATES ARE REQUIRED TO BRING THE ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS (EDUCATIONAL CREDENTIALS, WORK EXPERIENCE LETTER & 8
TH
GRADE CERTIFICATE OR BIRTH CERTIFICATE) TO THE INTERVIEW, NOT COPIES.
If at any stage during the selection process and/or even after job offer, it is found that any information furnished in the application is false / incorrect or if according to Ethiopian Skylight Hotel, the candidate does not satisfy the eligibility criteria for the post, her/his candidature will be cancelled.
The Final Result showcasing the list of candidates selected for job offer, will be displayed on our website
https://www.ethiopianskylighthotel.com/
or
https://corporate.ethiopianairlines.com/AboutEthiopian/careers/results

VENUE
: -
ETHIOPIAN AVIATION UNIVESITY, COMMERCIAL BUILIDING
DATE & TIME
PLEASE REFER YOUR SPECIFIC DATE AND TIME BELOW.
IF YOUR NAME IS NOT LISTED BELOW, IT MEANS THAT YOU ARE NOT SELECTED FOR THE NEXT PROCESS AND WE THANK YOU FOR YOUR INTEREST TO WORK FOR ETHIOPAN AIRLINES GROUP.
PLEASE NOTE THAT

CANDIDATES SHOULD COME UP WITH ORIGINAL RENEWED      KEBELE ID.
CANDIDATES SHOULD NOT BRING their MOBILE PHONE      TO THE INTERVIEW VENUE.
Candidates are REQUIRED to present themselves in appropriate office or business attire and maintain proper grooming standards.
NB:
IF ANYONE IS FOUND TO APPLY WITH FALSE INFORMATION, IT WILL LEAD TO SUBSEQUENT TERMINATION FROM THE PROCESS AT ANY STAGE UPON DISCOVERY OF THE FACT.

Description :
CALL FOR PRE-TRAINING
(ET-SPONSORED DIFFERENT AMT MODULARIZED AND AC MECHANIC TRAINEE CANDIDATES-DIFFERNET REGIONS)
AMONG THOSE CANDIDATES WHO HAVE REGISTERED AND TAKEN A GROUP DISCUSSION & ONE-TO-ONE INTERVIEW ASSESSMENT AT
DIFFERNET REGIONS
FOR THE POSITION OF
DIFFERENT AMT MODULARIZED AND AC MECHANIC TRAINEE
THE FOLLOWING CANDIDATES ARE REQUESTED TO COME TO ETHIOPIAN AIRLINES GROUP HEAD OFFICE ONLY PER THE BELOW MENTIONED DATE & TIME SCHEDULE FOR PRE-TRAINING PROCESSES.
VENUE:
ETHIOPIAN AIRLINES HEAD QUARTER, ETHIOPIAN AIRPORT ENTERPRISE BUILDING (RECRUITMENT & PLACEMENT OFFICE)
DATE & TIME
: -
REFER YOUR SPECIFIC DATE & TIME SCHEDULE FROM THE TABLE BELOW
IF YOUR NAME IS NOT LISTED BELOW, IT MEANS THAT YOU HAVE NOT BEEN SELECTED FOR THE NEXT PROCESS. WE THANK YOU FOR YOUR INTEREST TO WORK FOR ETHIOPIAN AIRLINES GROUP.
MANDATORY REQUIREMENTS: -
CANDIDATES WILL BEGIN WITH THE MEDICAL ASSESSMENT. FOR THOSE WHO PASS THE MEDICAL ASSESSMENT, THEY WILL MOVE ON TO THE LANGUAGE ASSESSMENT. THOSE WHO SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE THE LANGUAGE ASSESSMENT THE NEXT PROCESS WILL BE CONTACTED AS APPROPRIATE.
CANDIDATES SHOULD ARRIVE ON TIME. ANY CANDIDATE WHO ARRIVES LATER THAN THE MENTIONED      DATE & TIME WILL NOT BE ENTERTAINED.
CANDIDATES SHOULD COME WITH      PROPER BUSINESS ATTIRE AND GROOMING.
CANDIDATES ARE REQUIRED TO      BRING ORIGINAL & COPY OF THEIR EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENTS INCLUDING BIRTH      CERTIFICATE, 8
TH
GRADE MINISTRY CARD, 10
TH
& 12
TH
GRADE NATIONAL EXAMINATION CERTIFICATE, MARITAL STATUS CERTIFICATE/LETTER      FROM CONCERNED GOVERNMENT OFFICE AND/OR DIPLOMA/DEGREE TEMPO AS      APPLICABLE.
CANDIDATES ARE REQUIRED TO BRING ORIGINAL RENEWED KEBELE ID CARD WITH 2 COPIES (BACK      AND FORTH) AND 5 (FIVE) PASSPORT SIZE PHOTOGRAPHS WITH PROPER GROOMING.
CANDIDATES WHO FAIL TO MEET THE ABOVE REQUIREMENTS WILL BE AUTOMATICALLY DISQUALIFIED FROM THE PROCESS.
IF IT IS DISCOVERED AT ANY STAGE DURING THE      SELECTION PROCESS AND/OR AFTER THE TRAINING/JOB OFFER THAT ANY INFORMATION      SUBMITTED IN THE APPLICATION HAS BEEN EDITED AND/OR FORGED,      FALSE/INCORRECT IN ANY WAY, THE CANDIDATES' ELIGIBILITY WILL BE CANCELED.      AND THIS WILL LEAD TO SUBSEQUENT TERMINATION FROM THE PROCESS UPON      DISCOVERY OF THE FACT.

(ET-SPONSORED TRAINEE A/C MAINTENANCE TECHNICIAN, TRAINEE A/C STRUCTURE, TRAINEE A/C CABIN MAINTENANCE, : TRAINEE A/C AIRFRAME TECHNICIAN, TRAINEE A/C AVIONICS, TRAINEE A/C POWERPLANT TECHNICIAN & TRAINEE AIRCRAFT MECHANIC CANDIDATES-ADDIS ABABA)
AMONG THOSE CANDIDATES WHO HAVE APPLIED AND TOOK WRITTEN EXAM AT ADDIS ABABA FOR THE POSITION OF ET-SPONSORED TRAINEE A/C MAINTENANCE TECHNICIAN, TRAINEE A/C STRUCTURE, TRAINEE A/C CABIN MAINTENANCE, : TRAINEE A/C AIRFRAME TECHNICIAN, TRAINEE A/C AVIONICS, TRAINEE A/C POWERPLANT TECHNICIAN & TRAINEE AIRCRAFT MECHANIC CANDIDATES ON NOVEMBER 15, 2025, THE FOLLOWING LISTED CANDIDATES HAVE PASSED WRITTEN EXAM AND ARE REQUESTED TO COME FOR INTERVIEW ASSESSMENT ONLY AS PER THE BELOW PLACE, DATE & TIME SCHEDULE.
LOCATION: ETHIOPIAN AVIATION UNIVERSITY, PTS BUILDING.
DATE & TIME:
REFER YOUR SPECIFIC DATE & TIME SCHEDULE FROM THE TABLE BELOW
AND, IF YOUR NAME IS NOT LISTED BELOW, IT MEANS THAT YOU HAVE NOT BEEN SELECTED FOR THE NEXT PROCESS AND WE THANK YOU FOR YOUR INTEREST TO WORK FOR ETHIOPIAN AIRLINES GROUP.
PLEASE NOTE BELOW LISTED STANDARD REQUIREMENT:
CANDIDATES SHOULD ARRIVE ON TIME! ANY CANDIDATE WHO ARRIVES LATER THAN THE MENTIONED TIME WILL NOT BE ENTERTAINED.
CANDIDATES SHOULD COME UP WITH ORIGINAL RENEWED KEBELE ID.
MALE CANDIDATES ARE REQUIRED TO COME WITH PROPER BUSINESS ATTIRE AND CLEAN-CUT HAIR AND FULLY SHAVED BEARD.
FEMALE CANDIDATES WITH FORMAL HAIR AND DRESSING STYLE WILL ONLY BE ACCEPTED.
CANDIDATES WHO FAIL TO MEET THE ABOVE REQUIREMENTS WILL BE AUTOMATICALLY DISQUALIFIED FROM THE PROCESS.
IF ANYONE IS FOUND TO APPLY WITH FALSE INFORMATION, IT WILL LEAD TO SUBSEQUENT TERMINATION FROM THE PROCESS UPON DISCOVERY OF THE FACT.

Postion :

Description :
CALL FOR COMPETENCY-BASED INTERVIEW
Among those candidates who submitted their application for the position of
Security Officer
, for Wonchi Ija Eco Lodge in collaboration with Ethiopian Skylight Hotel, the following listed applicants are requested to come for
Competency Based Interview (CBI)
on
Thursday, February 26, 2026, @ 10:00 AM
in the
Afternoon
at
Ethiopian Skylight Hotel
Notes:
REPORTING TIME
: The candidates are requested to report on
Thursday, February 26, 2026
at the aforesaid venue (Ethiopian Skylight Hotel) at
@ 10:00 AM (Morning)
sharp.
Wonchi Ija Eco Lodge, in collaboration with Ethiopian Skylight Hotel, has admitted the candidates for the Interview Examination on the basis of information furnished during the application period. The eligibility of the candidates with regards to upper age, qualification and experience etc. will be re-verified at the time of second round documents verification. Appearing for the interview will not vest any right on the candidates for claiming her/his eligibility in fulfilling the criteria.
ALL CANDIDATES ARE REQUIRED TO BRING THE ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS (EDUCATIONAL CREDENTIALS, WORK EXPERIENCE LETTER & 8
TH
GRADE CERTIFICATE OR BIRTH CERTIFICATE) TO THE INTERVIEW, NOT COPIES.
If at any stage during the selection process and/or even after a job offer, it is found that any information furnished in the application is false/incorrect, or if, according to Wonchi Ija Eco Lodge, the candidate does not satisfy the eligibility criteria for the post, their/candidature will be cancelled.
Grooming & Attire Should Be Up to Standard.
Candidates Should Come Up with a Formal Hair and Dressing Style
The Final Result, showcasing the list of candidates selected for job offers, will be displayed on our website
https://www.ethiopianskylighthotel.com/
or
https://corporate.ethiopianairlines.com/AboutEthiopian/careers/results
